cards.heading: Auto-scaling production infrastructure
cards.body: Build systems that grow with demand. Terraform IaC, Kubernetes, load balancing, and monitoring that keeps costs predictable and performance consistent.

cards.heading: DevSecOps by design
cards.body: Security integrated into every layer — CI/CD pipelines, secrets management, least-privilege IAM, automated compliance checks, and audit logging built in from day one.

cards.heading: Cloud platform engineering
cards.body: GCP, AWS, or Azure — architect systems that leverage cloud AI services, serverless functions, managed databases, and cost-optimized configurations for your scale.

cards.heading: Production-ready on first deploy
cards.body: No prototypes. Zero-downtime deploys, runbooks, architecture decision records, and full platform documentation so your team ships and owns the system.

cards.heading: Fixed scope, fixed price
cards.body: Written proposal before any work begins. No surprises. Retainer support available post-delivery to keep systems running smoothly.

cards.heading: Latest: Autonomous Document Processing
cards.body: Recently shipped an autonomous document processing system leveraging GCP's AI services. Built the platform, infrastructure, and DevOps workflows from ground zero to production.
